text.title: Opportunity Solution Trees Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the Opportunity Solution Trees methodology end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and an optional decision gate.

step.name: pin-outcome
step.action: Pick exactly one metric-based outcome; record name + current value + target.
step.decision-gate: Refuse to proceed without value + target.

step.name: populate-opportunities
step.action: Attach unmet user needs as opportunity nodes; require N>=5 / >=2-source evidence per opportunity.

step.name: score-opportunities
step.action: Compute freq x sev x addr per opportunity; emit week-over-week delta.

step.name: attach-solutions
step.action: Move each candidate solution under the correct opportunity; reject orphan solutions.

step.name: attach-assumptions
step.action: For each solution, spawn >=1 falsifiable assumption with a named test type.
step.decision-gate: Refuse solutions with no falsifiable test.

step.name: monthly-prune
step.action: Identify dead branches (no evidence in 4+ weeks); emit kill list.
step.decision-gate: Refuse to publish monthly review with empty kill_list after 4 weeks.
